\tzpentry{ID3577}{Spectral Gap Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3577 introduces Spectral Gap Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Delta_s f = \frac{1}{\sqrt{|g|}}\partial_i\!\left(\sqrt{|g|}\,g^{ij}\partial_j f\right), \]
